performLotteryDraw(String, String) - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.EventRepository
Performs lottery draw by moving random users from IN_WAITLIST to CHOSEN.

test to see if an existing event poster can be updated in edit mode
preformDrawTest() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.EntrantsActivityTest
Test to see if performing a draw will move the correct number of entrants to chosen and update the database
privateEventHiddenFromListingAndQrTest() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.CreateEventActivityTest
test to see if creating a private event keeps it off the public listing and hides the promotional QR code
processExpiredWinners(String, String) - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.EventRepository
Removes all chosen or snoozed entrants and replaces them.
processExpiredWinners(String, String, long) - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.EventRepository
Helper method for processExpiredWinners kept for testing compatibility.
ProfileRemovedActivity - Class in com.example.eventlotterysystem
This is a class that is the controller of the activity_profile_removed screen this activity is launch when a user is logged into a deleted account

publicEventGeneratesQrCodeTest() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.CreateEventActivityTest
test to see if creating a public event allows the organiser to generate a promotional QR code
